title: SACRAMENTO, CA.
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: E-bikes are an amazing way for our kids to get around.
Children under 12 have the greatest number of e-bike accidents and risk of severe injuries.
There were 3,945 e-bike injuries between 2011 and 2020 according to the National Electronic Injury Surveillance System.
The e-bike injuries increased over time during the study period.
The 10-13 year old age group made up 44% of e-bike injuries.
Keeping children on a traditional bike until they are twelve is the best way to keep them safe.
